about.bio1: I design automation systems that eliminate repetitive work, reduce mistakes, and free up time for high-value tasks. Most of my projects start with process analysis and end with clean, maintainable scripts.
about.bio2: My core focus is Python automation, API integrations, and workflow orchestration. I build tools that connect services, sync data, and keep operations running consistently without manual intervention.
about.bio3: I currently work with clients through Upwork, Fiverr, and Contra, and I am open to new freelance collaborations where fast implementation, clear communication, and reliable results are required.

about.text1: I'm Mr Dep, a Python Automation Developer based in Lviv, focused on practical automation for day-to-day business operations.
about.text2: I build scripts and integrations that reduce manual work, improve team speed, and keep workflows stable under real production use.
about.text3: My stack includes Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Swift, and Java, with a strong focus on APIs, data flow, and process reliability.

Python Automation.
Real Results.
projects.detail.macApp.fullDescription: Mac Controller App is a native SwiftUI desktop tool that turns everyday macOS actions into a command-driven workflow with a clean chat-like interface. It was designed to simplify repetitive operations such as app launching, system control, and quick permission checks without opening system panels manually. The architecture is modular, so adding new commands and handlers stays predictable as the app grows.
projects.detail.macApp.point1: Fast command execution flow for common actions like open/close, volume, brightness, and lock.
projects.detail.macApp.point2: Native macOS look and behavior with SwiftUI keeps UX consistent and lightweight.
projects.detail.macApp.point3: Main challenge: handling AppleScript and Accessibility permissions reliably across devices.
projects.detail.macApp.point4: Scalable command engine design makes future automation scenarios easy to extend.
projects.detail.macScript.fullDescriptio: Mac Controller Script is a terminal-first automation tool for macOS that wraps common system operations into concise text commands. It targets speed and reliability for users who prefer keyboard workflows over GUI navigation, especially for repetitive daily tasks. The project keeps logic compact and extensible, so new commands can be added without refactoring the whole script.
projects.detail.macScript.point1: Fast startup and low overhead make it practical for quick command execution.
projects.detail.macScript.point2: Fuzzy matching tolerates minor typos in app and command names.
projects.detail.macScript.point3: Main challenge: balancing command flexibility with clear and predictable safety rules.
projects.detail.macScript.point4: Permission diagnostics are integrated so users can fix blocked actions directly from CLI.
projects.detail.weather.fullDescription: Weather App is an Android utility focused on quick daily forecasts with configurable location and temperature units. It combines API-driven weather data, local settings persistence, and practical interaction elements like widgets and scheduled notifications. The application is structured for reliable behavior in everyday use while keeping the interface simple and clear.
projects.detail.weather.point1: Convenient settings flow lets users switch city and units without leaving the main screen.
projects.detail.weather.point2: Home-screen widget and daily notifications improve practical long-term usage.
projects.detail.weather.point3: Main challenge: mapping weather codes to clear visuals and consistent UI states.
projects.detail.weather.point4: No API key required, which simplifies onboarding and deployment.
projects.detail.techstore.fullDescriptio: TechStore is a multi-page e-commerce showcase built to simulate a full front-end shopping journey without backend dependency. It includes catalog browsing, filtering, comparison, cart and checkout flows, plus language and theme controls for a realistic storefront experience. The project emphasizes maintainable structure and practical UI behavior suitable for portfolio and demo deployments.
projects.detail.techstore.point1: Complete client-side commerce flow demonstrates product-level UX consistency.
projects.detail.techstore.point2: Modular architecture makes page-level features easier to extend and maintain.
projects.detail.techstore.point3: Main challenge: keeping state synchronized across favorites, compare, and cart pages.
projects.detail.techstore.point4: Localization and theme support improve accessibility for wider audiences.
